query: CoinGlass crypto liquidation data June 2026 current 24h total
answer:
## CoinGlass Crypto Liquidation Data ‚Äî June 2026

### Key Finding: Real-Time Data Unavailable

I was unable to retrieve **live, real-time CoinGlass liquidation data for June 18, 2026** because all web access tools (WebSearch, WebFetch) are blocked in this environment. However, I was able to recover substantial liquidation data from archived research traces covering **early June 2026 (June 1‚Äì6)**, which represents the most recent available data.

---

### Most Recent Liquidation Data (Early June 2026)

#### June 3, 2026 ‚Äî Largest Single-Day Event
- **Total 24h liquidations: ~$1.76‚Äì$1.8 billion** (Investing.com & CoinLaunch.space, both citing CoinGlass)
- **Long liquidations: ~$1.53 billion** (~87% of total)
- **Short liquidations: ~$230 million** (~13% of total)
- **Context:** Bitcoin dropped from ~$71,360 ‚Üí ~$65,710 (>6% intraday), driven by $519M in spot BTC ETF outflows and Strategy (MSTR) selling 32 BTC.

#### June 2, 2026
- **Total 24h liquidations: ~$1.23 billion** (Yahoo Finance)
- Bitcoin crashed below $68K.

#### Early June Snapshot (Specific Window)
- **$749 million** in a 24h window (CoinJournal, citing CoinGlass)

#### Ethereum-Specific (Early June)
- **$1.2 billion in long ETH liquidations** as ETH dropped below $1,900 (CoinGecko)

---

### Summary Table

| Date | Total 24h Liquidations | Long | Short | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| June 3, 2026 | **$1.76‚Äì$1.8B** | ~$1.53B | ~$230M | Investing.com, CoinLaunch (CoinGlass) |
| June 2, 2026 | **~$1.23B** | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Yahoo Finance |
| Early June (snapshot) | **$749M** | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | CoinJournal (CoinGlass) |
| Early June (ETH only) | ‚Äî | $1.2B (ETH longs) | ‚Äî | CoinGecko |

### Data Gaps
- **No data for June 7‚Äì18, 2026** ‚Äî web access tools were unavailable.
- **No exchange-level breakdown** (Binance, OKX, Bybit, etc.)
- **No per-coin breakdown** beyond ETH.
- **No largest single liquidation order** data.

### Recommendation
For current June 18, 2026 data, the caller should visit [CoinGlass Liquidation Data](https://www.coinglass.com/LiquidationData) directly or use the CoinGlass API.

key_facts: Real-time CoinGlass liquidation data for June 18, 2026 was unavailable due to web access tool restrictions; most recent archived data covers June 1-6, 2026.
June 3, 2026 saw the largest single-day crypto liquidation event in the available data: ~$1.76-$1.8 billion in total 24h liquidations (CoinGlass data via Investing.com and CoinLaunch.space).
Long liquidations on June 3 were ~$1.53 billion (~87% of total); short liquidations were ~$230 million (~13%).
June 2, 2026 saw ~$1.23 billion in crypto liquidations as Bitcoin crashed below $68K (Yahoo Finance).
A separate early June snapshot showed $749 million in 24h liquidations (CoinJournal citing CoinGlass).
Ethereum-specific long liquidations reached $1.2 billion as ETH dropped below $1,900 in early June (CoinGecko).
The June 3 crash was driven by Bitcoin dropping from ~$71,360 to ~$65,710 (>6%), $519M in spot BTC ETF outflows (12th consecutive day), and Strategy (MSTR) selling 32 BTC.
No exchange-level breakdown (Binance, OKX, Bybit) or per-coin breakdown (beyond ETH) was available in the archived data.
